Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 2 

BELOW_BENCHMARK 

LABEL: Indicates Whether Part D Plan Offered Basic Plan with Premium Below Benchmark 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the plan benefit package is a stand-alone Prescription Drug Plan (PDP) that offers a 
basic benefit with a premium below the regional benchmark or de minimis amount. A beneficiary with 
a full (100%) low-income premium subsidy (LIPS)
